user.title: Lutron Keypad Controller
user.description: Configure a Lutron keypad (SeeTouch, Sunnata, Alisee, Palladiom, or Tabletop). The keypad must be visible in the Lutron Caséta integration. Leave all button programming blank in the Lutron software — all logic lives here.

error.lutron_not_loaded: The Lutron Caséta integration is not loaded. Set it up first.
error.serial_not_found: No Lutron device found with that serial number.
